item.title: U.S. FDA Approves Lupin's Ranluspec (ranibizumab-hkdz) as Interchangeable Biosimilar to Lucentis
item.description: Lupin Limited has received U.S. FDA approval for Ranluspec™ (ranibizumab-hkdz), an interchangeable biosimilar to Lucentis® (ranibizumab) for the treatment of wet age-related macular degeneration (AMD), diabetic macular edema (DME), and other serious retinal diseases. It is the first interchangeable biosimilar ranibizumab available in both vials and pre-filled syringes (PFS) in the United States.

item.title: ICH M15 Guidance: General Principles for Model-Informed Drug Development
item.description: The FDA has announced the availability of the final guidance for industry, 'M15 General Principles for Model-Informed Drug Development.' Developed by the International Council for Harmonisation (ICH), this document provides a harmonized framework for planning, evaluating, and documenting Model-Informed Drug Development (MIDD) evidence to ensure consistent and high-quality applications across global regulatory agencies.
